title: View item app
excerpt: Hello good morning. a general question. I would like to be able to see and read information about creating an app in the item view. The information I have found so far has not been enough. If there is a guide or a step b…

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello good morning. a general question. I would like to be able to see and read information about creating an app in the item view. The information I have found so far has not been enough. If there is a guide or a step by step it would be the most ideal. thanks in advance.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @isrraelRios,

The documentation we have about this is here. Board views and item views work in a very similar way.

If you have any specific questions, please send them over to appsupport@monday.com and we will be glad to help!

Cheers,
Matias
